name: SunBarFLX

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B725F949-1CD5-4C3B-8F02-EA1AB762FEE6

comment: The SunBar FLX is a high-performance, IP65-rated hybrid linear LED fixture that combines both strobe and washlight capabilities for versatile applications. Its hybrid design includes a central linear white LED beam that replicates the traditional xenon-bulb filament of classic strobes, alongside RGB+Warm White LED plate that provide intense washlight with superior color rendering, powered by Spektra OS.

gwSpecs.description: The SunBar FLX is a high-performance, IP65-rated hybrid linear LED fixture that combines both strobe and washlight capabilities for versatile applications. Its hybrid design includes a central linear white LED beam that replicates the traditional xenon-bulb filament of classic strobes, alongside RGB+Warm White LED plate that provide intense washlight with superior color rendering, powered by Spektra OS.
